CVE-2025-59378.title: In guix-daemon in GNU Guix before 1618ca7, a content-addressed-mi ...
CVE-2025-59378.description: In guix-daemon in GNU Guix before 1618ca7, a content-addressed-mirrors file can be written to create a setuid program that allows a regular user to gain the privileges of the build user that runs it (even after the build has ended).
